archive.title: Historical Collections
archive.subtitle: A curated archive of your seasonal journeys. Revisit past nourishments and integrate them into your current week.
archive.end_of_journey_body: You've reached the beginning of your Botanical Atelier journey.
archive.copy_confirm_title: Copy this week into the current week?
archive.copy_confirm_body: Meals will be added to week {{week}}, {{year}}. Existing meals in the current week are not overwritten.

import.title: Import recipe
import.subtitle: Paste a recipe URL and we'll turn it into a component.

step2.title: Review ingredients
step2.llm_warning: Extracted with AI — please review every row.

planner.title: Weekly Planner
planner.generate_prompt: Plan my week based on my goals and time slots.
planner.empty_state_no_slots_title: Set up your time slots first
planner.empty_state_no_slots_body: Define when you eat — breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks — so you can plan meals into them.

revert.title_one: {{count}} slot filled by the kitchen agent
revert.title_other: {{count}} slots filled by the kitchen agent
revert.body: Snapshot saved. Revert to discard the plan, or dismiss to keep it.

tray.title: This plate
tray.empty: Click any meal to add it. The first added becomes the hero.

plate.delete_confirm_body: All components on this plate will be removed.

settings_page.title: Workspace Preferences
settings_page.subtitle: Tailor your digital kitchen sanctuary to match your culinary workflow. These settings adjust how your editorial nourishment plan is curated and presented.

source.tooltip_db: This value is stored in the database and overrides any environment variable.
source.tooltip_env: This value is provided by an environment variable. Save a database override to change it at runtime.
source.tooltip_default: No value is configured — the application default is in effect.
source.env_also_set: An environment variable is also set for this key. The database value takes precedence.

ai.api_key_description: Your provider API key. Stored encrypted at rest when PLANTRY_SECRET_KEY is set.
ai.api_key_stored: A key is already stored ({{preview}}). Enter a new value to replace it.
ai.api_key_placeholder_replace: Enter a new key to replace the stored one
ai.click_test_to_load_models: Run Test connection to load available models.
ai.rate_limit_description: Maximum /api/ai/chat requests per minute per IP. 0 disables limiting.
ai.fake_script_description: Only used when provider = Fake. Path to a JSONL file of scripted replies.
ai.secret_key_banner_body: Set the PLANTRY_SECRET_KEY environment variable to enable editing API keys in the UI. Keys provided via environment variables continue to work without it.

wizard.step1_description: Choose which model provider should power the meal-planning assistant.
wizard.step2_description: Validate the key by fetching the list of available models.
wizard.step3_description: Pick the model the assistant should use for chat.

fdc.title: USDA FoodData Central
fdc.api_key_description: Enables live FDC ingredient search. Leave empty to disable.
fdc.api_key_stored: A key is already stored ({{preview}}). Enter a new value to replace it.
fdc.api_key_placeholder_replace: Enter a new key to replace the stored one

system.readonly_notice: Infrastructure settings are sourced from environment variables and require a restart to change.
system.env_tooltip: Set via {{envVar}}. Restart required to change.
system.secret_key_banner_body: PLANTRY_SECRET_KEY is not set — API keys cannot be saved through the UI until it is configured.

display_preferences.title: Display Preferences
display_preferences.theme_description: Choose between the editorial light palette and a dimmed evening mode.

slot.title: Meal Slots
slot.description: Define the meal times you plan around.
slot.no_slots: You haven't created any time slots yet.
slot.delete_confirm_body: Plates referencing this slot must be removed first.

ingredient.title: The Pantry Archive
ingredient.subtitle: A curated database of your botanical essentials, meticulously tracked for artisanal nourishment.
ingredient.edit_subtitle: Refine the essence of your culinary palette.
ingredient.new_subtitle: Add a new pantry essential to your botanical atelier.
ingredient.name: Name
ingredient.empty_state: No ingredients yet. Create your first one!
ingredient.section_image_hint: Add a photo so this ingredient is easy to spot in the catalog.
ingredient.section_macros_hint: Values per 100 g — used for live nutrition calculations.
ingredient.section_lookup_hint: Search Open Food Facts and USDA to pre-fill nutrition.
ingredient.no_results_body: Try a different search term or clear the filters.

component.title: Recipe Catalog
component.subtitle: Curated nourishment for your digital kitchen sanctuary. Explore seasonal flavors and mindful preparations.
component.edit_subtitle: Adjust the essence of your dish. Precise measurements ensure the editorial quality of your kitchen sanctuary.
component.new_subtitle: Every creation starts with a first draft. Sketch the essentials now — refine later.
component.name: Name
component.empty_state: No recipes yet. Create your first one!
component.section_image_hint: A clear photo helps recipes stand out in the planner and catalog.
component.ingredients_empty: No ingredients yet — add the first one to start tracking nutrition.
component.instructions_empty: No steps yet — add the first one to capture the method.
component.nutrition_per_portion_hint: Per portion · macro split shown by calories
component.nutrition_empty: Add ingredients to see live nutrition.
component.no_results_body: Adjust the filters or create a new recipe.

image.paste_hint: Or paste an image from the clipboard

profile.title: Profile & Targets
profile.description: Set your nutrition goals and preferences.
profile.system_prompt_placeholder: Describe your preferences for the AI...

template.title: Templates
template.subtitle: Press a plate you love into a template, then lay it down any day you like.
template.new_body: Create an empty template now and compose it later from the planner, or save an existing plate directly as a template.
template.save_as_body: Bookmark this plate so you can lay down the same components again in one click.
template.name: Template name
template.name_help: Keep it short — this is how it'll read in the picker.
template.delete_confirm_body: You can save another one anytime from an existing plate.
template.empty_body: Save a plate from the planner as a template to reuse its combo another day.

error.page_not_found_body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

ingredient.duplicate_name: An ingredient with this name already exists.
ingredient.in_use: This ingredient is used in a component and cannot be deleted.

component.duplicate_name: A component with this name already exists.
component.in_use: This component is used in a plate and cannot be deleted.

plate.feedback_invalid_status: Feedback status must be cooked, skipped, loved, or disliked.

slot.in_use: This time slot is used by plates and cannot be deleted.

image.upload_failed: Image operation failed. Please try again.
image.url_invalid: That URL is not a valid image address.
image.url_fetch_failed: Could not fetch image from that URL.

profile.invalid_macros: Macro percentages must sum to 100 or less, and calorie target must be positive.

template.in_use: This template still references a missing component.

ai.provider_missing: AI provider is not configured on the server.
ai.stream_interrupted: The AI stream was interrupted. Please try again.
ai.tool_not_found: The AI tried to use an unknown tool.
ai.iterations_exceeded: The AI ran too many tool steps — try a simpler request.
ai.rate_limit_exceeded: You're sending too many AI requests. Please wait a minute.

import.fetch_failed: Could not load the recipe page. Try pasting the page source instead.
import.body_too_large: The page is too large to import.
import.not_html: The URL did not return an HTML page.
import.no_recipe: No recipe was found on this page.
import.llm_failed: AI could not extract the recipe.

settings.readonly_key: This setting can only be changed via environment variable.
settings.invalid_api_key: The API key was not accepted. Double-check it and try again.
settings.secret_key_missing: PLANTRY_SECRET_KEY is not set — cannot save encrypted values.

shopping.title: Shopping List
shopping.empty: No ingredients — add meals to the planner first.

nutrition.title: Week Nutrition
nutrition.no_target_title: Set a daily target to see progress
nutrition.no_target_body: Add kcal and macro targets in Settings so daily bars can fill in.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.provider_missing: No AI provider is configured. Set PLANTRY_AI_PROVIDER and restart.

composer.placeholder: Ask me to plan a day, swap a meal, or explain a macro…
